overall.description: First-person exploration of a rainy futuristic city plaza in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The player walks through wet streets, circles a large black sculpture, ascends yellow stairs to an elevated walkway, and descends to street level while observing neon billboards and pedestrians with umbrellas.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban plaza with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through the wet plaza toward a yellow construction barrier with anime advertisements

notable_agents.action: walking with a white umbrella from left to right across the plaza

entered.detail: tall yellow barrier with anime character advertisements and graffiti
large illuminated advertisement panel featuring anime characters
rain-soaked asphalt surface reflecting neon lights and surroundings
tall futuristic buildings with glass facades and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a rainy futuristic city plaza with wet reflective ground. The camera approaches a yellow construction wall covered in anime advertisements while pedestrians with umbrellas walk through the area. Tall glass skyscrapers with neon signs rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with large abstract black sculpture

events.description: begins circling around the large black sculpture in the plaza center
camera tilts upward to view the sculpture against the overcast sky

agents.ego_description: circling around the black sculpture and examining it from various angles

entered.detail: large angular black monument with reflective surfaces and 'BARGHEST' text

segments.scene_description: The camera circles a massive black abstract sculpture in the plaza center, revealing its angular reflective surfaces and the 'BARGHEST' text. The yellow construction wall falls behind as the camera moves around the monument, with rain continuing to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian area leading to elevated walkway stairs

events.description: moves away from sculpture toward the yellow staircase structure

agents.ego_description: walking toward the yellow stairs leading to the elevated walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead toward the stairs

entered.detail: bright yellow staircase with wide steps leading upward
large pink neon billboard with 'WATSON WHORE' text on building facade

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the sculpture, the camera approaches a bright yellow staircase structure. A large pink 'WATSON WHORE' billboard is visible on the building to the left as the camera follows a pedestrian in red toward the stairs.

events.description: begins ascending the yellow stairs toward the elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: walking up the yellow stairs alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with white umbrella descending the stairs

entered.detail: bright yellow side railings lining the staircase
transparent canopy covering the upper stairway

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the yellow stairs, passing pedestrians coming down in the opposite direction. The stairway is partially covered by a glass overhead structure, providing shelter from the rain. The bright yellow railings line both sides of the concrete steps.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking busy street

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters the elevated walkway
observing vehicle traffic moving on the street below the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway with view of street traffic below

entered.detail: covered pedestrian bridge with wet concrete surface and orange railings
large vertical billboard featuring 'EL GUAPO' text and weapon advertisement
vehicles moving along the multi-lane street visible through the railing

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along an elevated pedestrian walkway with orange railings, overlooking a busy street with moving traffic below. An 'EL GUAPO' billboard is prominently displayed on the right, while the city stretches out into the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending staircase to street level with futuristic vehicle

events.description: begins descending stairs toward street level
approaching a parked futuristic white vehicle at street level

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs toward street level where a futuristic vehicle is parked

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing red umbrella descending ahead

entered.detail: sleek white futuristic car with illuminated accents parked at street level
storefronts and vendor stalls at the bottom of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera descends the stairs toward street level, following a pedestrian with a glowing red umbrella. A sleek white futuristic vehicle is parked at the bottom, with street-level shops visible to the right. The environment transitions from the elevated walkway back to ground level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy futuristic plaza that shifts from a crowded street view to a focused exploration of a central monument and nearby architecture. It begins by moving across wet, reflective ground toward a yellow construction wall adorned with anime advertisements, while pedestrians with umbrellas navigate the space beneath towering neon skyscrapers. As the camera advances, the focus shifts to circle a massive, angular black sculpture, revealing the reflective surfaces and the text BARGHEST as the construction wall recedes into the background. The scene then opens up as the camera moves away from the monument, following a pedestrian in red toward a bright yellow staircase. Finally, the perspective turns toward a large pink billboard on a neighboring building as the camera approaches the stairs.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a sheltered stairway to an elevated city overlook before descending back to the rainy street level. It begins by climbing yellow-railed concrete stairs under a glass overhead structure, passing pedestrians moving in the opposite direction. As the camera reaches the top, the scene opens onto a pedestrian walkway with orange railings that overlooks busy traffic and a prominent El Guapo billboard against a hazy city skyline. The perspective then shifts downward as the camera descends the stairs, following a pedestrian with a glowing red umbrella. Finally, the movement concludes at ground level, passing a sleek white futuristic vehicle and street-side shops.
